FR-01.title: Build Customer Registration API
FR-01.description: Create REST API endpoints for customer registration feature in Subscription Box Service. Implement business logic, validation, database operations, and error handling. Add authentication and authorization checks.

FR-01.description: Create user interface components for customer registration. Implement responsive design with form validation, loading states, error handling, and smooth transitions. Connect to API endpoints.
